2604.25220.title: DATAREEL: Automated Data-Driven Video Story Generation with Animations
2604.25220.paper_summary: Data videos are a powerful medium for visual data based storytelling, combining animated, chart-centric visualizations with synchronized narration. Widely used in journalism, education, and public communication, they help audiences understand complex data through clear and engaging visual explanations. Despite their growing impact, generating data-driven video stories remains challenging, as it requires careful coordination of visual encoding, temporal progression, and narration and substantial expertise in visualization design, animation, and video-editing tools. Recent advances in large language models offer new opportunities to automate this process; however, there is currently no benchmark for rigorously evaluating models on animated visualization-based video storytelling. To address this gap, we introduce DataReel, a benchmark for automated data-driven video story generation comprising 328 real-world stories. Each story pairs structured data, a chart visualization, and a narration transcript, enabling systematic evaluation of models' abilities to generate animated data video stories. We further propose a multi-agent framework that decomposes the task into planning, generation, and verification stages, mirroring key aspects of the human storytelling process. Experiments show that this multi-agent approach outperforms direct prompting baselines under both automatic and human evaluations, while revealing persistent challenges in coordinating animation, narration, and visual emphasis. We release DataReel at https://github.com/vis-nlp/DataReel.
2604.25220.paper_summary_zh: 數據視頻是一種強大的媒介，用於視覺數據為基礎的敘事，結合了動畫、以圖表為中心的視覺化和同步的旁白。這種形式廣泛應用於新聞、教育和公共傳播，幫助觀眾通過清晰且引人入勝的視覺解釋來理解複雜數據。儘管其影響力日益增長，生成數據驅動的視頻故事仍然具有挑戰性，因為這需要對視覺編碼、時間進程和旁白進行仔細的協調，以及在視覺化設計、動畫和視頻編輯工具方面的豐富專業知識。最近在大型語言模型方面的進展為自動化這一過程提供了新的機會；然而，目前尚無基準來嚴格評估基於動畫視覺化的視頻敘事模型。為了解決這一空白，我們介紹了DataReel，一個自動化數據驅動視頻故事生成的基準，包含328個真實世界的故事。每個故事都配有結構化數據、一個圖表視覺化和一個旁白文本，從而使模型生成動畫數據視頻故事的能力能夠系統性地進行評估。我們進一步提出了一個多代理框架，將任務分解為規劃、生成和驗證階段，反映了人類敘事過程的關鍵方面。實驗顯示，這種多代理方法在自動和人類評估下均優於直接提示基準，同時揭示了在協調動畫、旁白和視覺重點方面的持續挑戰。我們在 https://github.com/vis-nlp/DataReel 上發布了DataReel。
2604.25220.author: Ridwan Mahbub et.al.
2604.25220.authors: Ridwan Mahbub, Syem Aziz, Mahir Ahmed, Shadikur Rahman, Mizanur Rahman, Shafiq Joty, Enamul Hoque
